prompt: Create a photorealistic disposable-camera-style cosplay portrait of a young adult woman wearing a futuristic white cyber maid costume in a modern high-rise apartment kitchen at night. She stands centered from mid-thigh up, facing the camera, holding a round stainless-steel serving tray with both hands at waist level. Her outfit is glossy white with silver hardware: a white ruffled maid headband, long dark wavy hair, white structured bodice with translucent ruffle shoulder straps, a white choker with a large metal ring, silver chain details, metallic wrist cuffs, an upper-arm band, white apron panel, short layered skirt with translucent frills, and black-and-silver garter-like cyber accessories. Use white and silver as the main outfit palette and long dark brown hair. The setting is a sleek stainless-steel kitchen with a range hood and reflective metal backsplash on the right, warm under-cabinet lighting, wood lower cabinets, and a large dark window on the left showing a nighttime city skyline with scattered building lights. The image should feel like an amateur flash photo taken on a compact disposable camera: direct flash, slight grain, warm indoor highlights, high contrast, mild lens distortion, candid cosplay event energy, realistic skin and fabric textures. Keep the composition vertical, intimate, and documentary, with the subject occupying most of the frame. Add a large soft rectangular blur over the face to anonymize identity, while leaving hair, costume, and background visible. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, or exaggerated fantasy anatomy.
